title: [FIRRTL, Seq, SV] Restore LHS subaccess in aggregate preservation mode

features.name: conditional write to register array with dynamic LHS subaccess
features.description: Code should include a conditional write to a register array element using dynamic subaccess on the LHS, where the register is an unpacked array and the index is a variable

features.name: FIRRTL reg array with subaccess in when block
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL circuit with a register array declared using the 'reg' keyword and a conditional write inside a 'when' block using subaccess on the LHS
features.snippet:
reg r: UInt<2>[4], clock
when en:
  r[sel] <= in
